comment.body:
Alma, I just finished a synthetic data generator for daily bar returns on SPX for simulating drawdown to train some models on. I’m wanting to train them on mean reversion dynamics in different regimes and I’m wondering if I’m missing aspects in the model should be there for measuring if it is accurate compared to real SPX vol data? 

Would appreciate you input if you have any 🙏 just an inspired student trying to build
